## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm expo:doctor` for Expo or dependency changes
- [ ] `pnpm export:web` for app or UI changes
- [ ] Native development build checked for native or UI changes

## Visual changes

<!-- Add screenshots or recordings, or write "None". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Documentation and `.env.example` are updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, private endpoints, or product-specific branding are included.
- [ ] The lockfile matches package manifest changes.
